channel.title: AI Productivity on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in AI Productivity on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: How to Use ChatGPT for Small Business Growth: 50 Prompts to Start
item.description: Running a small business is a grind. You’re wearing a dozen hats—marketing, customer service, content creation, bookkeeping—and there’s never enough time to get it all done. You’ve heard about AI tools like ChatGPT, but figuring out how to use them effectively feels like another task on your already overflowing plate. What if you could offload some of that mental load with a tool that’s ready to help, if only you knew what to ask it?
